    A

    addShip(IShip) - Method in class battleship.Fleet
    Add ship boolean.
    addShip(IShip) - Method in interface battleship.IFleet
    Add ship boolean.
    adjacentPositions() - Method in interface battleship.IPosition
    Retrieves a list of positions that are adjacent to the current position.
    adjacentPositions() - Method in class battleship.Position
    Returns all valid adjacent positions (up, right, down, left) for this position.
    AiGame - Class in battleship
    Classe que gerencia o jogo de Batalha Naval contra uma IA baseada em LLM (Large Language Model).
    AiGame() - Constructor for class battleship.AiGame
    Construtor: inicializa o cliente HTTP e carrega a chave de API das variáveis de ambiente.

    B

    Barge - Class in battleship
    The type Barge represents a ship with a size of 1 unit.
    Barge(Compass, IPosition) - Constructor for class battleship.Barge
    Instantiates a new Barge.
    battleship - package battleship
     
    BOARD_SIZE - Static variable in class battleship.Game
     
    BoardView - Class in battleship
    Representa a visualização gráfica de um tabuleiro de Batalha Naval utilizando JavaFX.
    BoardView(IFleet, List, boolean) - Constructor for class battleship.BoardView
    Constrói uma nova visualização do tabuleiro e renderiza o seu conteúdo inicial.
    buildFleet(Scanner) - Static method in class battleship.Tasks
    This operation allows the build up of a fleet, given user data
    buildRules() - Method in class battleship.SystemPrompt
     
    buildUnifiedTable(IGame) - Static method in class battleship.PdfExporter
    Builds a single table interleaving alien moves and player moves.

    C

    Caravel - Class in battleship
    The type Caravel represents a ship with a size of 2 units.

    Instantiates a new Caravel.
    Carrack - Class in battleship
    The type Carrack represents a ship with a size of 3 units.

    Instantiates a new Carrack.

    The enum Compass.
    createAiGame() - Method in class battleship.Tasks
    Creates the AiGame.
    createGame(IFleet) - Method in class battleship.Tasks
    Creates the Game for a given fleet.
    createRandom() - Static method in class battleship.Fleet
    Creates a randomly generated fleet containing ships of various predefined types.

    E

    EAST - Enum constant in enum class battleship.Compass
    East compass.
    elapsed() - Method in class battleship.MoveTimer
    Devolve o tempo decorrido até ao momento em milissegundos (mesmo que ainda esteja a correr).
    equals(Object) - Method in record class battleship.IGame.ShotResult
    Indicates whether some other object is "equal to" this one.
    equals(Object) - Method in interface battleship.IPosition
    Equals boolean.
    equals(Object) - Method in class battleship.Position
    Compares this position to another object for equality.
    exportGameToPdf(IGame) - Static method in class battleship.PdfExporter
    Exports the full game history to a single unified PDF table.

    F

    findHittingMove(IPosition, List) - Static method in class battleship.Move
     
    fireMyShot(IPosition, boolean) - Method in class battleship.Game
    Efectua um único tiro do jogador sobre a frota do adversário.
    fireShots(List) - Method in class battleship.Game
    Fires a set of shots during a player's move.
    fireShots(List) - Method in interface battleship.IGame
    Fires a set of shots in a given move.
    fireSingleShot(IPosition, boolean) - Method in class battleship.Game
    Fires a single shot at the specified position, handling scenarios such as invalid positions, repeated shots, hits, misses, and sinking a ship.
    fireSingleShot(IPosition, boolean) - Method in interface battleship.IGame
    Fires a single shot at the specified position and indicates whether the shot is valid, repeated, and if it hit or sank a ship.
    firstMoveMessage() - Method in class battleship.SystemPrompt

    Formata um tempo em milissegundos numa string legível, por exemplo "2s 347ms".

    The type Frigate represents a ship with a size of 4 units.

    isHit() - Method in interface battleship.IPosition
    Is hit boolean.
    isHit() - Method in class battleship.Position
    Checks if this position has been hit by an attack.
    isInitialized() - Method in class battleship.AiGame
    Indica se a IA já fez pelo menos um movimento (ou seja, se o jogo já começou).
    isInside() - Method in interface battleship.IPosition
    Checks if the position is inside the board.
    isInside() - Method in class battleship.Position
    Checks if this position is valid on the game board.
    isOccupied() - Method in interface battleship.IPosition
    Is occupied boolean.
    isOccupied() - Method in class battleship.Position
    Checks if this position is occupied by a ship.
    isRunning() - Method in class battleship.MoveTimer
    Indica se o cronómetro está actualmente em funcionamento.

    Cria um novo MoveTimer (ainda não iniciado).

    P

    PdfExporter - Class in battleship
    PdfExporter is a utility class responsible for exporting Battleship game move history to a PDF document.

    Position - Class in battleship
    Represents a position on the game board.
    Position(char, int) - Constructor for class battleship.Position
    Constructs a new Position with the specified row and column.
    Position(int, int) - Constructor for class battleship.Position
    Constructs a new Position with the specified row and column.
    positions - Variable in class battleship.Ship
    The Positions occupied by the ship.
    printAlienBoard(boolean, boolean) - Method in class battleship.Game
     
    printAlienBoard(boolean, boolean) - Method in interface battleship.IGame
    Print the alien board (alien fleet + my shots).
    printBoard(IFleet, List, boolean, boolean) - Static method in class battleship.Game
    Prints the game board by representing the positions of ships, adjacent tiles, shots, and other game elements onto the console.
    printFloatingShips() - Method in class battleship.Fleet
    This operation prints all the ships of a fleet but not yet shot
    printMyBoard(boolean, boolean) - Method in class battleship.Game
     
    printMyBoard(boolean, boolean) - Method in interface battleship.IGame
    Print my board (my fleet + alien shots).
    printScoreboard() - Static method in class battleship.ScoreboardManager
    Prints the full scoreboard to the console, showing all past games ordered from oldest to most recent (order of insertion).
    printShips(List) - Method in class battleship.Fleet
    This operation prints all the given ships
    printShipsByCategory(String) - Method in class battleship.Fleet
    This operation prints all the ships of a fleet belonging to a particular category
    printStatus() - Method in class battleship.Fleet
    This operation shows the state of a fleet
    printStatus() - Method in interface battleship.IFleet
    Print status.
    printTimingStats() - Method in class battleship.Game
    Imprime uma tabela com o tempo gasto em cada jogada, incluindo o total, a média, a jogada mais rápida e a mais lenta.
    processEnemyFire(boolean) - Method in interface battleship.IMove
     
    processEnemyFire(boolean) - Method in class battleship.Move
    Processes the results of enemy fire on the game board, analyzing the outcomes of shots, such as valid shots, repeated shots, missed shots, hits on ships, and sunk ships.

    R

    randomBearing() - Static method in enum class battleship.Compass
    Generate a random compass direction (bearing).
    randomEnemyFire() - Method in class battleship.Game
    Gera uma rajada de tiros aleatórios inteligentes por parte do inimigo.
    randomEnemyFire() - Method in interface battleship.IGame
    Simulates a random enemy firing action on the game board.
    randomPosition() - Static method in class battleship.Position
     
    readClassicPosition(Scanner) - Static method in class battleship.Tasks
    This operation allows reading a position in the map
    readEnemyFire(String) - Method in class battleship.Game
    Processa os tiros disparados pelo inimigo recebidos em formato JSON.
    readEnemyFire(String) - Method in interface battleship.IGame
    Reads the result of an enemy firing action from input and interprets it.
    readMove(int, Scanner) - Static method in interface battleship.IMove
     
    readMyFire(Scanner) - Method in class battleship.Game
    Lê a rajada do jogador sobre a frota do adversário a partir do scanner.
    readPosition(Scanner) - Static method in class battleship.Tasks
    This operation allows reading a position in the map
    readShip(Scanner) - Static method in class battleship.Tasks
    This operation reads data about a ship, build it and returns it
    renderBoard(IFleet, List, boolean) - Method in class battleship.BoardView
    Responsável por desenhar todos os componentes do tabuleiro, incluindo as etiquetas de coordenadas e as células de jogo.
    repeated() - Method in record class battleship.IGame.ShotResult
    Returns the value of the repeated record component.
    repeatedShot(IPosition) - Method in class battleship.Game
     
    runMenu() - Method in class battleship.Tasks
    This task also tests the fighting element of a round of three shots

    S

    saveRecord(GameRecord) - Static method in class battleship.ScoreboardManager
    Saves a new GameRecord to the scoreboard JSON file.
    ScoreboardManager - Class in battleship
    Manages the game scoreboard by saving and loading GameRecord objects to/from a JSON file, and displaying the scoreboard in the console.
    ScoreboardManager() - Constructor for class battleship.ScoreboardManager
     
    sendMyShotsJson(String) - Method in class battleship.Game
    Recebe os meus tiros sobre a frota do adversário em formato JSON, processa-os e devolve um JSON com os resultados.
    setDuration(long) - Method in class battleship.Move
    Define o tempo gasto nesta jogada, em milissegundos.

    Returns the value of the ship record component.
